content_body: Thank you for making our getaway a wonderful experience. The reservation process was quick and easy. The accommodations were incredible, and the overall experience was fantastic! Our family of 5 had a great time enjoying the outdoors and all it had to offer. We could not get our 8, 9, and 10-year-old children out of the water - they absolutely loved it! Thank you Cabin Rentals of Georgia!!!
title: Fantastic Stay!
